name: image-studio-mcp
description: Codex plugin and local MCP server for OpenAI-compatible image generation and image editing.

interface.shortDescription: Generate and edit images through a local MCP server
interface.longDescription: Image Studio MCP adds a local MCP server to Codex for image generation and image editing. Configure OPENAI_BASE_URL and OPENAI_API_KEY once, then create or modify images with OpenAI-compatible image endpoints and save the results directly to local files.
defaultPrompt: Use Image Studio MCP to turn this prompt into a polished image and save it into my workspace
Use Image Studio MCP to edit an existing image with a new prompt and keep the result locally
Help me generate multiple concept images with gpt-image-2 through the local MCP server
